Hearing On The Motion To Apportion Settlment Funds.
Off Calendar Oct-07-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff's Motion to Apportion Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared on behalf of Brayton Purcell LLP.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court Orders that the following are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying personal injury - survival and wrongful death actions in the following proportions:

Sharline Compton, as Wrongful Death Heir - 40%
Richard Compton, as Wrongful Death Heir - 20%
Mark A.R. Compton, as Wrongful Death Heir - 20%
Billy Compton, as Wrongful Death Heir - 20%

Brayton Purcell LLP shall recover the sum of $1,028.00 as reasonable attorney fees & costs, leaving the net amount of $1,028.000. Any future net settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

The signature of Sharline Compton shall be sufficient on all settlement documents with any defendants in the underlying asbestos survival and wrongful death action.

Order Granting Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds was submitted to and signed by the Court.
